title: SR 19-3 / CA 19-2: CA 19-2: Large Financial Institution (LFI) Rating System
title_normalized: CA 19-2: Large Financial Institution (LFI) Rating System
section_path: Federal Reserve System > Supervision and Regulation > SR Letters > SR 19-3 / CA 19-2
issuing_agency: Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System
applicability_raw: This guidance applies to bank holding companies with total consolidated assets of $100 billion or more; all non-insurance, non-commercial savings and loan holding companies with total consolidated assets of $100 billion or more; and U.S. intermediate holding companies of foreign banking organizations with combined U.S. assets of $50 billion or more established pursuant to the Federal Reserve’s Regulation YY.
section_headings: TO THE OFFICER IN CHARGE OF SUPERVISION AT EACH FEDERAL RESERVE BANK AND TO LARGE FINANCIAL INSTITUTIONS
bm25_text: SR 19-3 / CA 19-2 CA 19-2: Large Financial Institution (LFI) Rating System This guidance applies to bank holding companies with total consolidated assets of $100 billion or more; all non-insurance, non-commercial savings and loan holding companies with total consolidated assets of $100 billion or more; and U.S. intermediate holding companies of foreign banking organizations with combined U.S. assets of $50 billion or more established pursuant to the Federal Reserve’s Regulation YY. BOARD OF GOVERNORS OF THE FEDERAL RESERVE SYSTEM WASHINGTON, D.C. 20551 DIVISION OF SUPERVISION AND REGULATION DIVISION OF CONSUMERAND COMMUNITY AFFAIRS TO THE OFFICER IN CHARGE OF SUPERVISION AT EACH FEDERAL RESERVE BANK AND TO LARGE FINANCIAL INSTITUTIONS SUBJECT:
vector_text_prefix: Federal Reserve SR Letter SR 19-3 / CA 19-2: CA 19-2: Large Financial Institution (LFI) Rating System
